title: Ram7
compiled_truth: Ram7 is an external contact at [PG&E](companies/pge). Over the corpus period (1999-06-02 to 2001-11-21), Ram7 sent 3 and received 16 emails, totalling 19 interactions. Top correspondents: [Lcampbe](people/lcampbe) (2), [Larry Campbell](people/larry-campbell) (1).
